Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 118 

INTRNL_USE_SMPL_SIZE_CD 

LABEL: For internal use. MEDPAR sample size. 

DESCRIPTION: MEDPAR Internal Use Sample Size Code Limited availability; for internal use only to identify the MEDPAR 
sample size: 20% (HIC 9th digit = 0, 5); 20% (HIC 9th digit = 4, 8; 60% (remainder). Where not available, 
this field will contain a zero. 

SHORT NAME: SMPLSIZE 

LONG NAME: INTRNL_USE_SMPL_SIZE_CD 

TYPE:
